cisco_identity_intelligence.notes: Choose the Cisco Identity Intelligence ingestion mode with --set variant webhook or --set variant aws_s3.

cisco_secure_firewall.notes: Choose the Secure Firewall collection mode with --set variant api, estreamer, syslog, or asa_syslog.

cisco_evm.notes: Cisco Security Cloud ships EVM knowledge objects and dashboards, but EVM telemetry is not configured through a CiscoSecurityCloud modular input in this repo. Install/validate Cisco Security Cloud here, then feed EVM sourcetypes through the supported upstream EVM pipeline.

cisco_secure_cloud_analytics.notes: Cisco Security Cloud includes the Security Cloud Analytics knowledge surface, but this repo does not configure a standalone SCA modular input. Install/validate Cisco Security Cloud here, then feed SCA telemetry through the supported upstream SCA/XDR pipeline.

cisco_cucm.handoff: Render or apply SC4S assets for CUCM syslog, then validate that cisco:ucm events are reaching the target index.
cisco_cucm.notes: CUCM is syslog-sourcetype coverage in SCAN rather than a product-specific Splunk app. This route provides the SC4S handoff instead of pretending there is a dedicated CUCM installer.

cisco_expressway.handoff: Render or apply SC4S assets for Expressway syslog, then validate that cisco:tvcs events are reaching the target index.
cisco_expressway.notes: Expressway coverage is syslog-sourcetype based. Use the SC4S workflow for collector assets and sourcetype validation.

cisco_meeting_management.handoff: Render or apply SC4S assets for Meeting Management syslog, then validate cisco:mm:system:* and cisco:mm:audit events.
cisco_meeting_management.notes: Meeting Management coverage is syslog-sourcetype based. Use the SC4S workflow for collector assets and sourcetype validation.

cisco_meeting_server.handoff: Render or apply SC4S assets for Cisco Meeting Server syslog, then validate that cisco:ms events are reaching the target index.
cisco_meeting_server.notes: Meeting Server coverage is syslog-sourcetype based. Use the SC4S workflow for collector assets and sourcetype validation.

cisco_imc.handoff: Render or apply SC4SNMP assets for IMC SNMP polling and use SC4S for syslog where needed, then validate cisco:infraops events.
cisco_imc.notes: IMC coverage is collector-oriented rather than a dedicated Splunk app. Start with SC4SNMP for SNMPv3 polling and pair with SC4S for syslog forwarding.

cisco_appomni.manual_gap_reason: This product is marked under_development in the packaged SCAN catalog and has no verified Splunk app, sourcetype, or local setup workflow in this repo yet.

cisco_radware.manual_gap_reason: This product is marked under_development in the packaged SCAN catalog and has no verified Splunk app, sourcetype, or local setup workflow in this repo yet.

cisco_cloudlock.notes: Cloudlock dashboards need the Cloudlock-specific settings in addition to the base Secure Access org account.

cisco_meraki.notes: This repo prefers the dedicated Meraki TA and can also apply the Enterprise Networking companion dashboards used by the SCAN catalog.

cisco_esa.notes: Installs the Splunk-supported Cisco ESA add-on. Configure ESA log forwarding or SC4S collection outside this product router, then validate the app and sourcetypes.

cisco_talos.notes: Installs Cisco Talos Intelligence for Enterprise Security Cloud. This integration requires a supported Splunk Enterprise Security Cloud deployment; finish Talos setup in the ES/SOAR workflow.

cisco_ucs.notes: Installs the Splunk-supported Cisco UCS add-on. Configure UCS Manager inputs in the add-on UI or supported Splunk docs.

cisco_wsa.notes: Installs the Splunk-supported Cisco WSA add-on. Configure WSA log forwarding or SC4S collection outside this product router, then validate the app and sourcetypes.

cisco_webex.notes: Installs the Webex Add-on for Splunk. Configure Webex REST API inputs in the add-on UI or vendor documentation.

cisco_access_points.notes: Access Points dashboards depend on Catalyst Center telemetry rather than a separate AP-only collector.

cisco_asr.notes: ASR dashboards depend on Catalyst Center telemetry in the current repo automation.

cisco_crs.notes: CRS dashboards depend on Catalyst Center telemetry in the current repo automation.

cisco_catalyst_switches.notes: Catalyst Switch dashboards depend on Catalyst Center telemetry rather than a switch-only collector.

cisco_isr.notes: ISR dashboards depend on Catalyst Center telemetry in the current repo automation.

cisco_wlc.notes: WLC dashboards depend on Catalyst Center telemetry rather than a standalone WLC collector.
